key.name: font
key.description: The font family to use in the editor. If empty, the system GTK font is used.

key.name: editor-margin
key.description: Left and right margin as a percentage of the editor width.

key.name: spell-check-enabled
key.description: Whether to enable WebKit built-in spell checking.

key.name: auto-save-interval
key.description: Automatically save the current document every N seconds. Set to 0 to disable.

key.name: show-toolbar
key.description: Whether to show the formatting toolbar by default.

key.name: default-format
key.description: The default format for new documents.

key.name: window-width
key.description: The saved window width for restoring window size.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The saved window height for restoring window size.
